//comment_die: 500x500 um. Sized for AXI regfile + compute_core + sub-blocks. Relax to 700x700 if placement fails.
//comment_density: 0.45 keeps placement loose. Raise to 0.55-0.65 if you need tighter packing; lower if utilization warnings appear.
//comment_paths: dir:: is relative to this config.json. Verify your repo layout matches: project/m3/synth/config.json with M2 RTL at project/m2/rtl/.
